description: This pipeline annotates an image with its properties. The main steps are to input an image, extract its properties, and annotate the image with these properties.

0660eee7-ee6a-4e33-8768-3565de92ee6f.name: ij1-extract-ome-image-xml
0660eee7-ee6a-4e33-8768-3565de92ee6f.description: Extracts the OME metadata XML from an OME image

02b12d25-d1a4-418e-8b4c-0c8d6abe0ba6.name: xml-annotate-with-xml-data
02b12d25-d1a4-418e-8b4c-0c8d6abe0ba6.description: Extracts a value from the input text data (via XPath) and annotates the data with the result. Please visit https://www.w3schools.com/xml/xpath_intro.asp to learn about XPath.

8b297ee5-1bdd-489a-be9e-74ade5df3b92.name: import-imagej-bioformats
8b297ee5-1bdd-489a-be9e-74ade5df3b92.description: Imports images via the Bio-Formats plugin

82ecc08c-4de3-48a9-95a9-aaa945119027.name: annotate-set-single
82ecc08c-4de3-48a9-95a9-aaa945119027.description: Sets a single annotation. The name and the value are determined by expressions

45c0be04-98c9-42ac-8a72-a1ab6a0ab748.name: annotate-set-single
45c0be04-98c9-42ac-8a72-a1ab6a0ab748.description: Sets a single annotation. The name and the value are determined by expressions

c43cbbac-fa45-4dfd-bb3a-0fb9aacfb64b.name: annotate-set-single
c43cbbac-fa45-4dfd-bb3a-0fb9aacfb64b.description: Sets a single annotation. The name and the value are determined by expressions

f81cb0da-ad52-4c98-bcba-d596a18fd2c7.name: image-properties-to-annotation
f81cb0da-ad52-4c98-bcba-d596a18fd2c7.description: Adds data annotations that contain the image properties.

577ce788-8df3-495a-bbcc-31ecc29dd535.name: annotation-merge
577ce788-8df3-495a-bbcc-31ecc29dd535.description:
Merges the annotations of all incoming data and outputs the same data with those merged annotations.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
